# Stéphane Peter

Official website: https://stephanepeter.com

## About
- Name: Stéphane Peter
- Role: Software Engineer, Musician, Entrepreneur
- Location: Los Angeles, California
- Education: Masters Degree in Computer Science, University of Nice

## Focus Areas
- Cross-platform product engineering
- iOS and web application development
- AI-assisted educational software
- Open-source software maintenance
